NAVAREA XIX 118/18
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 111830 UTC OCT 2018.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
72-35,5N - 020-22,6E SONGA ENABLER
71-18,7N - 022-15,2E FLOATEL ENDURANCE ACP GOLIAT FSPO 
67-05,9N - 006-51,5E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE
B. ACP-ADJACENT TO CHARTED PLATFORM 
C. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 116/18
